name: Account Management
mission: Determine whether account lifecycle evidence is ready for an ATO reviewer.

required_evidence_elements.label: Periodic access review
required_evidence_elements.description: Evidence shows accounts are periodically reviewed by an accountable team or owner.
required_evidence_elements.reviewer_gap: No cited evidence proves a periodic account or user access review.

required_evidence_elements.label: Inactive account disablement
required_evidence_elements.description: Evidence shows inactive accounts are disabled or deactivated after a defined threshold.
required_evidence_elements.reviewer_gap: No cited evidence proves inactive account disablement or deactivation.

required_evidence_elements.label: Temporary account lifecycle
required_evidence_elements.description: Evidence shows temporary accounts have ownership, expiration, approval, and removal or disablement.
required_evidence_elements.reviewer_gap: No cited evidence proves temporary account lifecycle management.

common_reviewer_questions: Does the system automatically disable inactive accounts after the required inactivity threshold?
Where is temporary account expiration and disablement evidenced?

name: Audit Review, Analysis, and Reporting
mission: Determine whether audit-review evidence proves logs are reviewed by accountable personnel on a defined cadence.

required_evidence_elements.label: Review cadence
required_evidence_elements.description: Evidence shows audit logs are reviewed on a defined daily, weekly, monthly, or recurring cadence.
required_evidence_elements.reviewer_gap: No cited evidence shows the audit review cadence.

required_evidence_elements.label: Reviewer identity or role
required_evidence_elements.description: Evidence identifies the person, team, role, or approver responsible for audit review.
required_evidence_elements.reviewer_gap: No cited evidence identifies who performs or approves audit review.

required_evidence_elements.label: Audit/log source
required_evidence_elements.description: Evidence ties the review to SIEM, logs, events, reports, or audit trail sources.
required_evidence_elements.reviewer_gap: No cited evidence ties the review to an audit log, SIEM, event, or report source.

common_reviewer_questions: Are audit logs reviewed on a defined cadence by an accountable reviewer?
What source system or SIEM report proves the audit review occurred?

name: Configuration Settings
mission: Determine whether configuration evidence proves baseline settings and approved deviations are managed.

required_evidence_elements.label: Baseline or benchmark source
required_evidence_elements.description: Evidence ties configuration settings to a baseline, STIG, SCAP scan, benchmark, or hardening source.
required_evidence_elements.reviewer_gap: No cited evidence ties configuration settings to a baseline or benchmark.

required_evidence_elements.label: Configuration drift monitoring
required_evidence_elements.description: Evidence shows configuration drift or compliance posture is monitored.
required_evidence_elements.reviewer_gap: No cited evidence shows configuration drift or compliance monitoring.

required_evidence_elements.label: Deviation approval
required_evidence_elements.description: Evidence shows deviations, exceptions, or bypasses are documented and approved.
required_evidence_elements.reviewer_gap: No cited evidence shows approval of configuration deviations or exceptions.

common_reviewer_questions: How are deviations from baseline configuration settings documented and approved?
What scan or drift-monitoring evidence proves the baseline is maintained?
